name: superloopy
description: Lightweight loop harness with strict evidence gates.

interface.shortDescription: Strict evidence loop harness without heavyweight ceremony
interface.longDescription: Superloopy provides repo-local loop state, explicit success criteria, append-only evidence ledgers, and Codex hook guardrails while keeping workflow overhead low.
defaultPrompt: Use superloopy loop begin for new tasks.
After hook approval, Superloopy bootstraps the CLI wrapper and bundled custom agents on SessionStart.
Run superloopy loop guide --json before choosing the next Superloopy command.
Record Superloopy evidence for this change, using superloopy loop prove when command output is the proof.
